news.title:
JPM initiates Neutral on Pine Labs with ₹165 target, citing 23-25% CAGR in digital payments TAM.
Strong merchant network, EBITDA margin to ~27% by FY28; revenue CAGR moderates to ~17%.
news.summary:
JPM initiates Neutral on Pine Labs with ₹165 target, citing 23-25% CAGR in digital payments TAM.
Strong merchant network, EBITDA margin to ~27% by FY28; revenue CAGR moderates to ~17%.

news.title:
RBI penalized Bank of India, Central Bank of India, Union Bank, and Pine Labs for non-compliance.
Penalties imposed: Rs 95.4L on BOI, Rs 63.6L on CBI, Rs 58.5L on UBI, Rs 3.1L on Pine Labs.
news.summary:
RBI penalized Bank of India, Central Bank of India, Union Bank, and Pine Labs for non-compliance.
Penalties imposed: Rs 95.4L on BOI, Rs 63.6L on CBI, Rs 58.5L on UBI, Rs 3.1L on Pine Labs.

news.title: RBI penalizes Pine Labs for KYC violations tied to prepaid instruments.
news.summary: RBI penalizes Pine Labs for KYC violations tied to prepaid instruments.

news.title:
RBI fined Pine Labs ₹3.1 lakh for issuing full KYC PPIs without proper customer verification, citing compliance gaps.
Pine Labs shares fell 3% to ₹159.45 on NSE, down 32% YTD; UBS sees 43% upside vs Paytm valuation.
news.summary:
RBI fined Pine Labs ₹3.1 lakh for issuing full KYC PPIs without proper customer verification, citing compliance gaps.
Pine Labs shares fell 3% to ₹159.45 on NSE, down 32% YTD; UBS sees 43% upside vs Paytm valuation.

news.title:
VerbaFlo, an AI-driven real estate platform, raised $7M in seed funding.
The round was led by Pi Labs, with Haatch, Navigate Ventures, and others participating.
news.summary:
VerbaFlo, an AI-driven real estate platform, raised $7M in seed funding.
The round was led by Pi Labs, with Haatch, Navigate Ventures, and others participating.

news.title:
Pine Labs to introduce stablecoin prepaid card in 9 countries by April.
CEO confirms expansion to Middle East, Africa, and Southeast Asia.
news.summary:
Pine Labs to introduce stablecoin prepaid card in 9 countries by April.
CEO confirms expansion to Middle East, Africa, and Southeast Asia.

news.title:
Pine Labs secures multi-year deals with India's top 3 oil firms for payment upgrades.
Contracts involve 130,000 devices deployment and managing IOCL's Xtrapower rewards.
news.summary:
Pine Labs secures multi-year deals with India's top 3 oil firms for payment upgrades.
Contracts involve 130,000 devices deployment and managing IOCL's Xtrapower rewards.

news.title:
Pine Labs' subsidiary, BTPL, completed acquisition of 100% stake in Agya Technologies, an NBFC-AA.
Acquisition cost INR 13.9 Cr; Agya Technologies now a step-down subsidiary with RBI's approval.
news.summary:
Pine Labs' subsidiary, BTPL, completed acquisition of 100% stake in Agya Technologies, an NBFC-AA.
Acquisition cost INR 13.9 Cr; Agya Technologies now a step-down subsidiary with RBI's approval.

news.title:
Pine Labs partners with OpenAI to integrate APIs, enhancing merchant systems for intelligent commerce in India.
The collaboration aims to advance fintech solutions through innovative technology integration.
news.summary:
Pine Labs partners with OpenAI to integrate APIs, enhancing merchant systems for intelligent commerce in India.
The collaboration aims to advance fintech solutions through innovative technology integration.

news.title:
New-age firms have reduced IPO sizes, adjusting valuations.
Neysa secures $1.2 billion funding amidst market adjustments.
news.summary:
New-age firms have reduced IPO sizes, adjusting valuations.
Neysa secures $1.2 billion funding amidst market adjustments.

news.title:
Pine Labs faces a GST demand of ₹37.3 crore for FY 2019-20 linked to Qwikcilver.
The company plans to appeal the order; no immediate financial impact expected.
news.summary:
Pine Labs faces a GST demand of ₹37.3 crore for FY 2019-20 linked to Qwikcilver.
The company plans to appeal the order; no immediate financial impact expected.

news.title:
Pine Labs invests INR 128.9 Cr in 2,57,330 SFNPL shares via Rights Issue, retaining 100% ownership.
SFNPL, a fintech firm, processes payments and provides tech solutions; FY25 turnover: INR 1983.9M.
news.summary:
Pine Labs invests INR 128.9 Cr in 2,57,330 SFNPL shares via Rights Issue, retaining 100% ownership.
SFNPL, a fintech firm, processes payments and provides tech solutions; FY25 turnover: INR 1983.9M.

news.title:
Pine Labs uploaded analyst call recording held on Jan 28, 2026.
Recording available on their website under Investor Relations section.
news.summary:
Pine Labs uploaded analyst call recording held on Jan 28, 2026.
Recording available on their website under Investor Relations section.

news.title:
Pine Labs posted Q3 net profit of ₹42.4 crore vs a loss of ₹56.7 crore YoY.
Revenue grew 23.7% to ₹744 crore; EBITDA rose 70% to ₹131.5 crore; margin reached 17.7%.
news.summary:
Pine Labs posted Q3 net profit of ₹42.4 crore vs a loss of ₹56.7 crore YoY.
Revenue grew 23.7% to ₹744 crore; EBITDA rose 70% to ₹131.5 crore; margin reached 17.7%.

news.title: Voice AI startups gain traction; PhonePe plans IPO to capitalize on growth.
news.summary: Voice AI startups gain traction; PhonePe plans IPO to capitalize on growth.

news.title:
Pine Labs partners with UAE's Wio Bank to enhance merchant acquiring infra.
DCB Bank reports 14.9% rise in NII; Gravita invests ₹14 crore in lithium battery recycling.
news.summary:
Pine Labs partners with UAE's Wio Bank to enhance merchant acquiring infra.
DCB Bank reports 14.9% rise in NII; Gravita invests ₹14 crore in lithium battery recycling.

news.title:
Pine Labs Ltd invested INR 64 Cr in 4.83 Cr equity shares of BrokenTusk Tech, a wholly owned subsidiary, via Rights Issue.
The acquisition supports BTPL's working capital and growth, with no change in Pine Labs' shareholding in BTPL.
news.summary:
Pine Labs Ltd invested INR 64 Cr in 4.83 Cr equity shares of BrokenTusk Tech, a wholly owned subsidiary, via Rights Issue.
The acquisition supports BTPL's working capital and growth, with no change in Pine Labs' shareholding in BTPL.

news.title:
Pine Labs' board to review Q3 FY26 financial results on Jan 28, 2026.
Investor/Analyst call scheduled on Jan 28, 2026, at 6 PM IST via video conference.
news.summary:
Pine Labs' board to review Q3 FY26 financial results on Jan 28, 2026.

news.title:
Pine Labs' subsidiary, Setu, gets RBI approval to acquire 100% stake in Agya Technologies.
Agya Technologies operates as an RBI-authorized NBFC-AA; acquisition to be completed in tranches.
news.summary:

Sebi approves PhonePe's IPO, marking significant market progress.
